data.text:
Thank you very much! 🙏 How can I assist you today? 😊 Please choose one of the following options:

**1. Shastra Daan:**
Donate for Shastra Daan: _Support the distribution of spiritual knowledge._ 📖✨

**2. Purchase Books:**
Purchase Spiritual Literatures: _Order a selection of sacred books from our Book Store._ 📚🛒

**3. Ask Queries:**
Donation OR Sales OR Courses Related Queries: _Get help with any donation or book purchase or courses._ ❓💬

data.name: blk_kuLjMRv
data.label: Ask Button Option

data.caption:
_**🌸 Help Us Spread the Wisdom of the Bhagavad Gita & Vedic Texts 🌸**_

Hare Krishna! 🙏
We are on a mission to distribute Bhagavad Gita and other Vedic texts to those in need—especially children, poor villagers, and those without access to these sacred teachings. 📖✨

The Bhagavad Gita is not just a book—it’s a guide to life, wisdom, and peace. By reading it, individuals can find strength, clarity, and a deeper connection to their true self. 🙌💫

By donating these books, you are helping illuminate hearts and minds with divine knowledge. Your contribution can change lives, bringing hope and spiritual growth to those who need it most. 💖🌱

Every little bit counts! Together, we can make a difference! 🌺

For donating please click on donate.jivadaya.org 🙏

*Yours in service to Lord Krishna & humanity*
_**Jivadaya ISKCON Pune**_

data.name: blk_SfuJJqz

data.caption:
_**🌸 Help Us Spread the Wisdom of the Bhagavad Gita & Vedic Texts This Ashadhi Ekadashi 🌸**_

Hare Krishna! 🙏
We are on a sacred mission to distribute *Bhagavad Gita* and other Vedic texts to *Varkaris* during _Dindi Yatra,_ starting from *9 July 2026 to 25 July 2026,* culminating on **Ashadhi Ekadashi (25 July 2026).** 📖✨

The *Bhagavad Gita* is not just a book—it’s a guide to life, wisdom, and peace. 🙌💫This year, we have pledged to **distribute 25,000 Gitas** to devotees and pilgrims, bringing *divine knowledge and spiritual upliftment* to hearts along the pilgrimage. 💖🌱

By donating these books, you are helping illuminate hearts and minds with divine knowledge. Your contribution can change lives, bringing hope and spiritual growth to those who need it most. 💖🌱

Every little bit counts! Together, we can make a difference! 🌺

For donating please click on https://donate.jivadaya.org 🙏

*Yours in service to Lord Krishna & humanity*
_**Jivadaya ISKCON Pune**_
